output.summary: 11-layer depth-recurrence GPT freezes early blocks and runs 30-epoch SGD momentum per 32K chunk for legal score-first TTT adaptation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal score-first test-time training repeatedly adapts on validation chunks with SGD while scoring each token beforehand.
techniques: Depth recurrence with shared BlockCores, partial RoPE, and VE on deep layers
Legal score-first TTT: 30-epoch SGD momentum per chunk with frozen early layers
Int6+zstd quantization plus SWA and Late QAT
